executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 98 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 43 as HIGH risk. 20 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

key_recommendations.impact: Reduces attack surface by eliminating highest-risk exposure vectors

Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR

key_recommendations.impact: Proactive identification of undetected compromise indicators
